text.title: RSpec Testing Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for writing an RSpec spec.

step.name: scaffold-spec
step.action: Create spec/<unit|requests>/<path>_spec.rb. Wrap in `RSpec.describe <SUT> do ... end`. Decide require 'spec_helper' vs 'rails_helper'.

step.name: model-state-with-context
step.action: Group specs by precondition: `context 'when X' do; context 'when Y' do; ...`. Each context contains its specific setup.

step.name: build-stubbed-or-create
step.action: If spec asserts on DB state → create(:resource). Else → build_stubbed(:resource).
step.decision-gate: If unit spec uses create(:x) without DB assertion, STOP and switch to build_stubbed.

step.name: extract-shared-examples
step.action: When ≥2 specs check the same invariant, extract `shared_examples_for 'auditable' do ... end` in spec/support/shared/; include via `it_behaves_like 'auditable'`.

step.name: run-and-profile
step.action: Run `bundle exec rspec --profile 10` to find slowest 10 specs; convert create→build_stubbed where applicable.
